She forgot her umbrella and got soaked on the way.
He burned the toast because he fell asleep on the sofa.
The dog ran straight to the door when he heard the keys.
She couldn't remember where she had parked her car.
He left his wallet on the kitchen counter again.
The package arrived two days earlier than expected.
She forgot to set her alarm and woke up late.
The cat knocked the glass off the table and walked away.
He realized he had gone to the wrong classroom.
She sent the email to the wrong person by mistake.
The train was delayed for forty minutes this morning.
He burned his hand while cooking dinner last night.
She found ten dollars in a jacket she hadn't worn in months.
He missed his bus stop because he fell asleep.
The dog ate his homework and looked completely innocent.
She tripped on the last step but caught herself.
He forgot his lunch on the counter before leaving.
The movie they wanted to see was completely sold out.
She got to the checkout and realized she had no cash.
He walked into the door because he wasn't paying attention.
The baby finally fell asleep after three hours of crying.
She packed her bag the night before so she wouldn't rush.
He arrived at the party with the wrong address.
The light in the hallway had been flickering for weeks.
She forgot to return the library book for a month.
He spent all morning looking for his glasses.
The elevator was broken so they walked up twelve floors.
She called the wrong friend to complain about the other one.
He showed up to the meeting on the wrong day.
The zipper on her bag broke on the first day of her trip.
She read the same page four times and still forgot it.
He got a paper cut opening a birthday card.
The parking meter ran out just as the inspector arrived.
She meant to buy one thing and came home with ten.
He answered the phone and it turned out to be a survey.
The kids came home from school covered in mud.
She found her keys in the freezer by accident.
He practiced his speech so much he could say it backwards.
The ice cream melted before she could finish eating it.
She noticed the price tag on her shirt mid-conversation.
He overcooked the pasta and had to start again.
The bus driver waited because he saw her running.
She spilled coffee on her shirt before her interview.
He forgot his umbrella on the exact day it poured.
The neighbour's dog barked all through the night.
She got lost on the way to a place she had been before.
He finally fixed the squeaky door that had bothered him for months.
The road was closed so the drive took twice as long.
She laughed so hard at her own joke she couldn't finish it.
He set three alarms and still slept through all of them.
The windshield was frozen and he had no scraper.
She came back from lunch to find someone in her seat.
He said goodbye to the wrong person thinking they were leaving.
The soup was so hot she burned her tongue on the first sip.
She waved at someone who was not actually waving at her.
He stayed up all night and then could not get up in the morning.
The library book she needed had already been borrowed.
She finished the crossword puzzle without any help.
He got off the bus one stop too early in the rain.
The plant she bought died within a week.
She put the milk in the cupboard instead of the fridge.
He forgot what he went upstairs to get.
The candle burned down while she was in the other room.
She printed twenty copies of the wrong document.
He left the house and immediately forgot if he locked the door.
The children were too excited to sleep the night before.
She bumped into her old teacher at the supermarket.
He called his sister instead of his friend by mistake.
The shop closed five minutes before she got there.
She sat through the whole film and fell asleep at the end.
He gave the wrong change and had to sort it out.
The cat hid under the bed during the whole thunderstorm.
She wore her shirt inside out for the entire day.
He got the hiccups right before his big presentation.
The cake sank in the middle but tasted fine.
She arrived at the airport without her passport.
He ordered the wrong meal and ate it anyway.
The baby laughed for the first time at breakfast.
She wore two different shoes all the way to work.
He sneezed and sent a half-finished email to his boss.
The queue at the post office barely moved for an hour.
She burned the popcorn and had to open all the windows.
He forgot the name of someone he had just met.
The dog got muddy right after his bath.
She locked herself out in her pyjamas.
He replied to the group chat instead of one person.
The coffee machine broke on the busiest morning of the week.
She dropped her phone face down on the pavement.
He said the wrong name when introducing his friend.
The car ran out of fuel on the way to the station.
She tried on something in a shop and got stuck in it.
He got to work and realized he was wearing odd socks.
The meeting was moved and nobody told him until after.
She burnt the roof of her mouth on the very first bite.
He tripped on a flat surface and tried to act normal.
The fish she was defrosting had been in the freezer for a year.
She forgot her reusable bag and had to buy another one.
He nodded along to something he did not understand at all.
The alarm went off during the quietest part of the film.
She went to the wrong floor and waited in the wrong office.
